Full Episodes Up!!!
2003'1'24 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, just like I promised, I brought you episodes. They are the newest and latest english eps for DBZ. They are episodes 267-272. Their in our multimedia section, so go check out the full eps you all have been pestering me for. Hopefully these will stay up for quite some time. So download and enjoy while you can / More To Come Later / MG Out...

*FULL Dragon Ball Z EPISODES


Note to Staff: Plz do not post over this until I give permission.

Fused Anime
2003'1'22 ++ posted by Sinister
Hello...well i havent posted in a long time...because i have been very busy..1 with school and the otehr with my site fused anime. Its pretty good...we already have over 600 hits..and i think thats good sense i just opend it.Anyways i would like you to go look at it and hopefully like my site. the url is www.fused-anime.com . i am looking for affiliates sense i only have 3(sssgohan,namekevolution and endlesski). Thanks please visit my site.

Episodes Coming Soon!
2003'1'21 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey, just like the title says. New Episode downloads are coming soon to DBGT.COM (hopefully if everything works out). My good friend over at DB Vortex has just opened a hosting site call A-Tech where you all can get some awesome hosting deals on a fast server. The prices are amazing!

So we'll be sharing media together. I should get it up today, or in about 2 days, depending, since this week I'm very busy... stupid school and stupid exams / Thats It For Now / MG Out...

* Visit A-Tech For Great Hosting!

At last!!
2003'1'21 ++ posted by Tricksta
I would just like to notify everyone, that after long wait, the script for Episode 80 is at last complete! Sorry that I have not been heard from in a while, I have been busy and lazy with things. But I did finish the script so we can all rejoice. This will be up tomorrow when Draton updates the site. As well as this, two of my self-written rap songs will be put up in the humor section. There is one for Master Roshi and one for Hercule (Mr. Satan). On top of this I will have a few more biographies done as well. Maybe some vehicle info as well. I'm am picking myself up now to give more of my efforts to Dragonball Grand Tour. Expect better from me for now on. That is all for now, til tomorrow, Tricksta out...

New Site Open!
2003'1'20 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone, there is a new site open. I like to help out webmasters, and so here I am helping a person by giving a link to his site on DBGT. He's nice, and i wanted to give him a shout out. Everyone take a look at Endless Ki. I found it good for a young site, and he has just opened with some info, so go check it out. Endless Ki, well i'm out for now. Draton, signing out...

Hey!
2003'1'20 ++ posted by SMGoten2
Just got back from bowling in state. I got first, with two weeks left for others to win. Anyways... I'm gonna get started on episode 8 summary tommorrow, so be looking forward to it!

Evolutions RPG
2003'1'19 ++ posted by MadNeo
There is a great new forums RPG at Tokyo Online Forums. It's the best RPG that I've found online yet. Register for the forums at http://animega.net/forums and go into the Evolutions RPG forum for more info on how to join.

Working on Stuff
2003'1'18 ++ posted by Draton
Hey ppls, i got a quick update. Well first off, I hope you guys are loving that humor :)! I'll be adding a lot more stuff to the section, just be patient. Sorry for the lack of episode summaries, just been kind of busy, but i'll start those again soon. Next, I realized I seriously need to get some tutorials up and stuff for people, so I'll start a tutorial on something maybe today or tomorrow. I have some stuff coming, just sit tight. Also, as MG mentioned, take a good look at GameVelocity, they have some good stuff going there. Well, I'm done. Draton, signing out..

GameVelocity GRAND OPENING!!!
2003'1'17 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, hope your enjoying the site. I just wanted to give a huge shout out to my bro over at GameVelocity which just opened. And has ALL YOUR ANIME/GAMING NEEDS! They sell games for the newest consoles and merchandise from many animes at the absolute lowest prices possible. They now even have Dragon Ball Z DVD's! Priced at lower than $18! What else have they got? Well at GameVelocity, they also have actions figures, vhs videos, and much much more! I highly suggest that if you looking for Anime/Gaming merchandie, you head on over to GameVelocity and have a browse around.

We guarantee the best reliable service. GameVelocity is DBGT.COM certified, meaning it can be trusted to get to you all that you've ordered without any hassle! So if your in search of some Anime/Gaming Merchandise, go on over to GameVelocity right now! And check out all that they have in stock.

*Visit GameVelocity NOW!!!



Episode 7 is up!
2003'1'17 ++ posted by SMGoten2
Episode 7 summary is now up and ready to be seen! I'll start on 8 tommorrow night! =SMGoten2 Out=

SITE INFORMATION

Website Bio:.
Site Layout Revision: 10/19/02
Site Creation: -'97
Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Site Statistics:
Live Stats: 17 users online

NEWS TICKER
Site News: Site upgrades are currently being processed, and can be viewable as progressions are made. Image Gallery is now undergoing constructions, and image additions are being made. Multimedia is on its way, and new information and game reviews are being processed as well.
DB News: PS2 video game information is being scattered among DBZ web sites, and an official trailer has been released. New DBZ series episodes are being aired. More information is soon to come.
Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.
